import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_payment(order_id: str, amount: float):
    try:
        result = charge_card(amount)
        logger.info("payment_success", extra={
            "order_id": order_id,
            "amount": amount,
            "transaction_id": result["txn_id"],
        })
        return result
    except PaymentDeclined as exc:
        logger.error("payment_failed", extra={
            "order_id": order_id,
            "amount": amount,
            "transaction_id": None,
            "error": str(exc),
        })
        raise

def transfer_funds(sender: str, recipient: str, value: float):
    try:
        txn = do_transfer(sender, recipient, value)
        logger.info("transfer_complete", extra={
            "sender": sender,
            "recipient": recipient,
            "amount": value,
            "ref": txn.ref,
        })
    except InsufficientFunds:
        logger.warning("transfer_failed", extra={
            "sender": sender,
            "recipient": recipient,
            "amount": value,
            "ref": None,
            "reason": "insufficient_funds",
        })
        raise
